overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a neon-lit pachinko arcade at night, exiting onto a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street, and approaching two NPCs engaged in conversation. The scene features vibrant neon lighting in green, purple, and red hues reflecting off wet pavement, with Japanese text visible on the arcade machines.

arcade cabinet with purple neon lighting displaying game graphics
arcade cabinet with red neon lighting showing Trauma Drama game

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow arcade corridor lined with vibrant neon-lit gaming machines in green, purple, and red. A woman in pink is visible playing a machine on the left as the player moves forward through the carpeted interior space.

doorway leading out of the arcade to the street

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the arcade, the player passes a man wearing headphones engrossed in a pachinko machine on the left. The exit doorway becomes visible ahead as the player continues walking past the bank of machines.

segments.scene_description: The player exits the arcade into a rainy cyberpunk night, transitioning from the enclosed neon interior to the open street. The wet pavement reflects the warm glow of the 'Bliss' neon sign and a large red paper lantern hanging overhead as the player steps onto the concrete sidewalk.

events.description: turns left to walk past the Bliss storefront with mannequin display

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet asphalt street, the player passes the Bliss storefront with its glowing mannequin display on the left. A large digital billboard is visible ahead mounted on a building facade, while trash bags line the right side of the street. The red paper lantern remains visible overhead as the player continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with two men conversing near a storefront

events.description: slows down and stops near the two men engaged in conversation

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping near two men having a conversation on the street corner

segments.scene_description: The player approaches two men in red vests standing and conversing on the street corner beneath a large digital billboard. The player slows to a stop near them, with the building facade and trash bags visible to the right, while the street extends into the dark cyberpunk city beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the enclosed, neon-lit interior of a gaming arcade out into a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street. It begins by gliding through a narrow corridor of vibrant green, purple, and red gaming machines, passing a woman in pink and a man with headphones engrossed in pachinko. As the camera moves forward, the enclosed space opens up through an exit doorway, transitioning the atmosphere from the carpeted arcade to a rainy night where wet pavement reflects the warm glow of a red paper lantern and a neon sign. The scene then expands along the asphalt street, passing a glowing mannequin display at the Bliss storefront and trash bags lining the sidewalk under a towering digital billboard. Finally, the camera slows to a stop as it approaches two men in red vests conversing on a street corner, with the dark city extending into the distance beyond the building facade.
